title: Towns And Nations - DiscordSrv
description: DiscordSrv integration for Towns and Nations
body:
Towns And Nations – DiscordSRV extends the Towns and Nations
 plugin by providing integration with DiscordSRV

It automatically relays key in-game events to your Discord server, keeping your community informed and engaged even when they’re not online.

Features

- 📜 Diplomacy updates – relation changes, proposals, and acceptances
- ⚔️ War notifications – declarations, victories, and surrenders
- 🏠 Town and region events – creation, deletion, independence, and membership changes
- 💎 Landmark events – claiming and unclaiming
- 🧑‍🌾 Player activity – joining towns, applying for membership
…and more!


Requirements

- [Towns and Nations](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towns-nations)
- [SphereLib](https://modrinth.com/plugin/spherelib)
- [DiscordSRV](https://modrinth.com/plugin/discordsrv)

![Example screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a5f2eaf6f6bdbabd4ae77ed1b4d8dc1707dcd3f.png)
